ddl.where: "is_realtime" = true and "is_published" = true and "enable_platform" && ARRAY[2]::smallint[] and "publish_start_time" is not null and "notification_start_boundary_at" is distinct from "publish_start_time"
ddl.name: app_announcement_realtime_publish_start_pending_idx

ddl.where: "is_realtime" = true and "is_published" = true and "enable_platform" && ARRAY[2]::smallint[] and "publish_end_time" is not null and "notification_end_boundary_at" is distinct from "publish_end_time"
ddl.name: app_announcement_realtime_publish_end_pending_idx

ddl.where: "shortcode" is not null and "deleted_at" is null
ddl.name: emoji_asset_shortcode_live_key

ddl.where: "reply_to_id" is null and "audit_status" = 1 and "is_hidden" = false and "deleted_at" is null
ddl.name: user_comment_target_root_floor_id_idx

ddl.where: "target_type" = 5 and "audit_status" = 1 and "is_hidden" = false and "deleted_at" is null
ddl.name: user_comment_forum_topic_visible_latest_idx

ddl.where: "left_at" is null and "hidden_at" is not null
ddl.name: chat_conversation_member_hidden_user_idx

ddl.value: "publish_start_time" is null or "publish_end_time" is null or "publish_start_time" < "publish_end_time"
ddl.name: app_announcement_publish_window_valid_chk

ddl.value: "popup_background_position" in ('center', 'top center', 'top left', 'top right', 'bottom center', 'bottom left', 'bottom right', 'left center', 'right center')
ddl.name: app_announcement_popup_position_valid_chk

ddl.value:
(
      "resolved_reward_items" is null
      and "resolved_reward_source_type" is null
      and "resolved_reward_rule_key" is null
    ) or (
      "resolved_reward_items" is not null
      and "resolved_reward_source_type" in (1, 2, 3)
    )
ddl.name: check_in_record_reward_resolution_consistent_chk

ddl.value: ("kind" <> 2) or ("shortcode" is not null and "image_url" is not null)
ddl.name: emoji_asset_kind_custom_required_chk

ddl.value:
(
      ("asset_type" in (1, 2) and btrim("asset_key") = '')
      or ("asset_type" in (3, 4, 5) and btrim("asset_key") <> '')
    )
ddl.name: growth_reward_rule_asset_key_not_blank_chk

ddl.value: ("processing_token" is null and "processing_started_at" is null) or ("processing_token" is not null and "processing_started_at" is not null)
ddl.name: growth_reward_settlement_processing_lease_pair_chk

ddl.value: "start_at" is null or "end_at" is null or "start_at" <= "end_at"
ddl.name: task_definition_publish_window_valid_chk

ddl.value: ("processing_token" is null and "processing_started_at" is null and "processing_expired_at" is null) or ("processing_token" is not null and "processing_started_at" is not null and "processing_expired_at" is not null)
ddl.name: task_event_failure_processing_lease_pair_chk

ddl.value:
(
      ("asset_type" in (1, 2) and btrim("asset_key") = '')
      or ("asset_type" in (3, 4, 5) and btrim("asset_key") <> '')
    )
ddl.name: user_asset_balance_asset_key_not_blank_chk

ddl.value: "reply_to_id" is not null or "floor" is not null
ddl.name: user_comment_root_floor_required_chk

ddl.value: ("actor_type" = 1 and "moderator_id" is not null) or ("actor_type" = 2 and "moderator_id" is null)
ddl.name: forum_governance_action_log_moderator_presence_chk

ddl.value: "moderator_id" is not null or "application_id" is not null
ddl.name: forum_moderator_lifecycle_log_subject_present_chk

ddl.value: "category_key" <> 'task_reminder' OR ("task_id" IS NOT NULL AND "assignment_id" IS NOT NULL AND "reminder_kind" IS NOT NULL)
ddl.name: notification_delivery_task_reminder_lookup_required_chk

ddl.value: ("operator_type" = 1 and "operator_user_id" is not null) or ("operator_type" = 2 and "operator_user_id" is null)
ddl.name: workflow_job_operator_user_id_scope_chk

ddl.value: ("work_type" = 1 and "novel_content_path" is null) or ("work_type" = 2 and "comic_content_manifest" is null)
ddl.name: work_chapter_content_type_valid_chk
